sections.title: Design
sections.content: This ride is almost a clone of the Big Thunder Mountain Railroad at Magic Kingdom in Orlando, Florida, USA.

fullText:
Big Thunder Mountain (Japanese: ビッグサンダー・マウンテン) is a steel roller coaster located at Tokyo Disneyland in Urayasu, Chiba, Japan.

This ride is almost a clone of the Big Thunder Mountain Railroad at Magic Kingdom in Orlando, Florida, USA.

Brown track, the supports are hidden inside the mountain.
